author: kimiwu
content: Hi everyone, I am Kimi. I‘d like to work on `Ream: Minimal PeerDAS Data Availability Client` . I've been looking into it for the last week and already drafted a plan. I'm gonna dive in this week. Cheers!

author: cristian_1337
content:
Hi everyone, I’m Cristian. Very excited to meet you all!

This week I’m planning to take a deeper look into the proposed projects for the cohort with the goal of exploring underlying topics that I haven’t had the chance to take a look on yet. My goal is to gain more familiarity with each of these subjects before committing to a specific project. I’m currently most interested by the improvements included in the Hegota hard fork, like FOCIL (EIP-7805) and Optional Execution Proofs ( EIP-8025), and also interested in the Decentralized CL checkpoint sync idea. I will dive deeper into these subjects through the week.

On the side, I started setting up Lighthouse CL with Reth EL locally, and I will continue the setup as part of my goal to check the current state of implementation, wrt the above, across multiple CL clients. My plan is to also check and setup Prysm.

Excited to get started! Good luck to everyone!
